# collaboration-approval-gate

User-directed collaboration stages that preserve draft review and explicit approval before any write operation.

## OpenClaw handling

- Approval remains explicit before any write operation.
- The runtime surface is CLI-only, so approval checkpoints are documented and must be executed by a wrapper or operator.
- No gateway or channel-native approval widgets are implied.

## Stages

- `question` (agent) -> approval gate `none` using fallback `native_mapping`
- `options` (agent) -> approval gate `none` using fallback `generated_wrapper`
- `decision` (user) -> approval gate `none` using fallback `generated_wrapper`
- `draft` (agent) -> approval gate `none` using fallback `protocol_downgrade`
- `approval` (user) -> approval gate `before_write` using fallback `external_runner`

## Invariants

- `approval_before_write` = true
- `human_decision_owner` = true
